svg.aria-label: Clickable hotspot overlay for the 1981 James Madison University and Harrisonburg illustration
svg.metadata: Draft transparent SVG overlay generated from the chat image copy: 2047 × 1726. Paths are clipped so displayed hit regions do not overlap. Use data-id to join each hotspot to JSON, CSV, or Google Sheets rows. Stroke color can be changed with CSS variable --hotspot-stroke.
